chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 485 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.2399/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.2400/2024. 04.05.2026 Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Sattar Silat, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent, same is taken on record. It is jointly stated that since the case before this court is of remand of the Order-in-Original to the adjudicating authority for adjudication afresh within 60 days, hence, it may be just and proper for the said order to be complied with without prejudice to the right of respondent in such regard. In view hereof, reference application is disposed of accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
